《跳龙门之争锋》在红果app已上映。
外贸学院大四学生宋渔遭女友背叛、富二代霸凌跌入谷底，神秘哥哥宋尘归来，安排云城大佬“老狼”暗中护航。
宋渔不靠背景，凭狠劲与智慧在龙门集团实习，以“强龙清洁剂”为突破口，肃清学校腐败势力登顶学生会主席，横扫周边高校收服刺头，最终在多方博弈中成为大学城霸主。
自此，宋渔也开始一段属于自己的江湖路！

25278","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一路从虎出山走过来的，水琴还是很符合年轻人的口味的，看的开心，有时候我媳妇儿都在说我跟个傻子一样，看个小说还能笑出声，她真不懂那种心情，反正我是铁杆我骄傲，支持！！","text_exts":[{"e":6,"s":3,"text":"虎出山","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%99%8E%E5%87%BA%E5%B1%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741007273886FDDF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227398978308286825278%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227321709971014437950%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%99%8E%E5%87%BA%E5%B1%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722713991,"group_id":"7321709971014437950","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxzxvLEwBe8ZIt76ukiz2FM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/937e6fe4866148c88bb41abdac5591e7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617318&x-signature=CJELjiJNAVCZ1AmgLa7SJ%2FnbDNI%3D","user_id":"109810492284","user_name":"梦无常ZS"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109810492284","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7321709971014437950","book_info":{"abstract":"原书名：跳龙门
